title: IT Project Manager
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: Join our team in Aix-en-Provence to lead projects IT strategic. You will ensure the success of the assigned projects in terms of timelines, costs and quality.
mission.1: Cadrer et planifier les projets IT
mission.3: Coordonner les équipes internes et prestataires
mission.4: Suivre les livrables et gérer les risques
mission.5: Assurer la relation client au quotidien
mission.6: Rédiger les bilans et retours d'expérience
profile.2: 3 à 7 years of experience in pilotage de projets IT
